# ReadMe AI Documentation

## Docs

- [Overview](guides/overview.md): High-level introduction to the ReadMe AI Service, its purpose as an MCP server and AI proxy, and key features including chat, vectorization, linting, and evaluation capabilities.
- [Getting Started](guides/getting-started.md): Step-by-step guide to setting up the AI service locally, including prerequisites (Node.js 22.x, API keys), installation, building, and running the development server.
- [Environment Configuration](guides/environment-configuration.md): Complete reference for all environment variables, API keys, and configuration options required for different features (OpenAI, Google Gemini, MongoDB, ReadMe integration).
- [MCP Server](guides/mcp-server.md): Comprehensive guide to the Model Context Protocol server implementation, including project identification, tool registration, caching strategy, and integration with AI assistants like Claude and Cursor.
- [Ask AI Chat](guides/ask-ai-chat.md): Documentation for the conversational AI chatbot feature with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), covering chat modes, customization options, and LLM configuration.
- [AI Agent](guides/ai-agent.md): Guide to the tool-augmented AI agent capabilities, including available tools (knowledge retrieval, web search, URL analysis, content editing), tool call flow, and extended reasoning modes.
- [Vectorization](guides/vectorization.md): Documentation for indexing documentation into vector embeddings for semantic search and RAG, including the vectorization process, CLI usage, and troubleshooting.
- [AI Linting](guides/linting.md): Guide to AI-powered content analysis for markdown documentation, including rule validation, style guide compliance scoring, and pattern detection.
- [CLI Tools](guides/cli-tools.md): Reference for all command-line interfaces including chat CLI, vectorization CLI, linting CLI, evaluation CLI, and MCP Inspector for testing.
- [Testing and Validation](guides/testing.md): Guide to running unit tests, integration tests, manual testing scenarios, and required pre-commit validation including linting and type checking.
- [API Reference](guides/api-reference.md): Complete API endpoint documentation for chat, agent chat, vectorization, and linting routes, including request/response formats and authentication.
- [Evaluation and Benchmarking](guides/evaluation.md): Documentation for creating evaluation datasets, running evaluations against ground truth data, and interpreting evaluation results for chat and linting features.
- [Deployment](guides/deployment.md): Guide to deploying the AI service to production, including Render configuration, environment setup, PR testing with render-preview label, and Terraform infrastructure management.
- [Troubleshooting](guides/troubleshooting.md): Common issues and solutions including server startup problems, build failures, test failures, MCP integration issues, and performance expectations.
- [Development Workflow](guides/development-workflow.md): Best practices for making changes to AI services, adding dependencies, managing the build process, and ensuring code quality through linting and testing.
